svg.title: High-level architecture of the art visualizer and product search agent
svg.desc: A client tier connects to a backend region containing an API gateway, agent orchestrator, and three services, which in turn connect to a data layer and the Gemini API.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the API gateway do in this architecture?')
sendPrompt('Explain the agent orchestrator tool-calling loop')
sendPrompt('How does the search service work?')
sendPrompt('How does the image editing service work?')
sendPrompt('Why is an async job queue needed for image generation?')
sendPrompt('What goes in the PostgreSQL relational tables?')
sendPrompt('How does the pgvector index enable style search?')
sendPrompt('What is stored in object storage?')
sendPrompt('Which Gemini image models place art on a wall?')
sendPrompt('How does Gemini Embedding 2 power multimodal search?')
sendPrompt('How does the Gemini text model drive the agent?')
